abort.no_devices_found: No includable devices found. Make sure your device is in inclusion mode and try again.

error.inclusion_failed: Failed to include the device. Please try again.

user.description:
Put your device into inclusion mode (refer to your device's manual if unsure how), then click **Next**.

**Note:** Devices included here are paired locally with the gateway and will not show up in the GARDENA app. If you wish to continue to use the app, include the device through the GARDENA app instead.
user.title: Include a GARDENA device
